mapper.insert: insert into bi_id_mapping (table_name, offline_uuid, server_id, create_time) values (#{entityType}, #{offlineUuid}, #{serverId}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select id, table_name as entityType, offline_uuid as offlineUuid, server_id as serverId, create_time as createTime from bi_id_mapping where table_name = #{entityType} and offline_uuid = #{offlineUuid} limit 1
select id, table_name as entityType, offline_uuid as offlineUuid, server_id as serverId, create_time as createTime from bi_id_mapping where 1=0
